name: Break-Glass Account Validator
description: Validates emergency access accounts against CIS and Microsoft security benchmarks. Ask me to check if your break-glass accounts are compliant, review configuration gaps, or verify monitoring is in place.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Check if our break-glass accounts are compliant
When did our emergency accounts last sign in?
Are our break-glass accounts excluded from all conditional access policies?
Do we have alerts configured for break-glass sign-ins?
